description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the .build/ directory per job using a key based on the job name and branch. Use the swift:4.1 Docker image for the linux-4.1 and linux-release-4.1 jobs, and the norionomura/swift:swift-4.2-branch image for the linux-4.2 and linux-release-4.2 jobs. Define a linux-4.1 job that runs "swift build", a linux-4.2 job that runs "swift build", a linux-release-4.1 job that runs "swift build -c release", and a linux-release-4.2 job that runs "swift build -c release". Add a swiftlint job using the norionomura/swiftlint image that runs "swiftlint". All jobs run in the default test stage with no special rules or artifacts.
